Drop your photos with Danish in this folder, using these exact filenames,
and they'll automatically appear in the gallery:

  danish1.jpg
  danish2.jpg
  danish3.jpg
  danish4.jpg
  danish5.jpg

Until you add real photos, the gallery shows a soft placeholder tile
for each missing image instead of a broken-image icon — so the site
always looks intentional, even before you've added photos.
